layout_requirements.logo_position: top-left inside mobile banner safe margin
layout_requirements.cta_position: right side button inside safe margin
layout_requirements.text_density: no more than 6 short text blocks

hero_visual_requirements: steam or warm breakfast cue visible
conditional_rules: If the hero background is busy or bright, place copy on a solid or high-opacity panel.
If a source/disclosure line is present, keep it readable in the lower safe area.
